name: @helix402/contracts
description: Helix402 Solidity contracts — atomic settlement + fee split for x402 payments
author: Helix402

scripts.build: npx hardhat compile && npm run build:abi
scripts.build:abi: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});const abis={Helix402Router:require('./artifacts/contracts/Helix402Router.sol/Helix402Router.json').abi,MockUSDC:require('./artifacts/contracts/MockUSDC.sol/MockUSDC.json').abi};fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.js','module.exports='+JSON.stringify(abis,null,2)+';');fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.d.ts','export declare const Helix402Router: readonly any[];\nexport declare const MockUSDC: readonly any[];\n');"
